content:
Hi Chan — I don’t have any property valuation data in the info I can see, so I can’t tell which of your properties is the most expensive right now.

To find that in the app:
- Go to **[View Portfolio](/portfolio)** and sort the list by **Market / Current value** (click the column header).
- Or use **[Analytics](/analytics)** and open the “Top assets by value” (or similar) panel to see assets ranked by value.
- Click a property to open its page for valuation history and documents.

If you want, tell me a property ID (e.g. PROP-0001 or PROP-0006) and I can look for available documents or tell you where to find its title/lease files. Which would you like to do?
